description: Evidence reporting whether the m=1 kink mode is stable in helical or rotating Z-pinch settings at moderate Mach-Alfven number. Value 1 = stable, 0 = unstable / persists.

scope.framework: Hall MHD; Legolas SARI computation; MHD literature; SARI spectral theory; ideal MHD Atlas H1-H5; ideal MHD node counting; linear ideal MHD eigenmode analysis; whistler instability
